headline: Ares Capital (ARCC) Stock Sees Fair Value Cut As Analysts Turn More Cautious
summary: Ares Capital is back in focus after its fair value estimate in one model moved from about US$22.64 to roughly US$20.77, putting a tighter ceiling on where some analysts see the stock. Street commentary has tilted more cautious, with several firms trimming price targets and resetting ratings as they weigh risks around earnings, dividend coverage, and credit quality. In the sections that follow, you will see how this evolving narrative around Ares Capital might shape the way you track the stock...
